gui.mcooxidizer.oxidizer.energy_hint: Each active lane consumes FE every tick.
gui.mcooxidizer.oxidizer.progress_hint: Runs while copper, a chip, output space, and FE are available.
gui.mcooxidizer.oxidizer.slot.chip.desc: Controls the target oxidation stage for this lane.
gui.mcooxidizer.oxidizer.slot.copper.des: Accepts supported copper blocks and variants.
gui.mcooxidizer.oxidizer.slot.wax.desc: Optional honeycomb or wax precursor for waxed output.
gui.mcooxidizer.oxidizer.title: Oxidizer
